description: You are a control systems engineer porting a balance controller to a simulated Segway robot. The uncalibrated world is loaded in Webots, but the robot falls over because the default physics and sensor parameters do not match the real hardware. Configure the SEGWAY_ROBOT Sim2Real properties by setting the main chassis mass to 45.5 kg and the center of mass to 0 0 0.15. Update the left_encoder and right_encoder resolution to 0.001534 and set the pitch_gyro noise to 0.005. Save the calibrated world to /home/ga/Desktop/segway_calibrated.wbt.
